enabled.description: Enable or disable the Amazon Polly speech provider.

voice.description: Default Polly voice ID (e.g. Joanna, Mia).

engine.description: Polly engine type (neural, standard, generative, long-form).

region.description: AWS region for the Polly service (e.g. us-east-1).

languageCode.description: Optional BCP-47 language code (e.g. en-US, es-MX).
